sources.headline: Richard M. Rawlings Dies: Charlie s Angels Desperate Housewives Cinematographer With Four Emmy Noms Was 82
sources.summary: Richard M. Rawlings Jr, a second-generation cinematographer with four career Emmy noms whose credits range from the original Charlie s Angels to L.A. Law, Gilmore Girls and Desperate Housewives, has died. He was 82. The American Society of Cinematographers confirmed the news but did not provide details about cause, place or date of death.
